entries.label: Upgrade scaffold to new Atelier version
Guided handshake for credentials AI cannot self-provision
Find_similar (advisory search aid; per ADR-006 + ADR-042 + ADR-043)
Prototype is canonical artifact AND coordination dashboard
Fencing tokens mandatory on all locks from v1
Decisions write to decisions.md first, datastore second
find_similar ships at v1 with eval harness + CI gate (originally fit_check)
No multi-tenant SaaS; self-hosted OSS only
All 5 sync substrate scripts ship together
Territory + contract model extended to non-code
One hive, many projects (plural projects schema from v1)
Two orthogonal substrates: SDLC sync + coordination
MCP as likely agent interop protocol
Figma is feedback surface, not design source
Switchman as dependency for file-level locks
Multi-trace-ID support on contributions and decisions
Remote-surface commits via per-project endpoint git committer (originally locus)
Transcripts as repo-sidecar files, opt-in by config
Reference implementation stack: GitHub + Supabase + Vercel + MCP
Per-ADR file split — DECISIONS.md becomes a directory
Three-tier consumer model — Specification / Reference Implementation / Reference Deployment
Contribution.kind scoped to output discipline (drop proposal + decision)
Contribution lifecycle state separated from blocked status flag
Contract metadata covers ARCH 6.6.1 classifier surface
Immortal author identity via composer_id; session_id is operational only
Decisions table cleanup -- drop convention, add triggered_by_contribution_id
Composer role split into discipline + access_level
Plan-review state added to contribution lifecycle (per-territory opt-in, default off)
12-tool surface consolidation: propose_contract_change replaces publish_contract + get_contracts
find_similar adopts hybrid retrieval (vector + BM25 via RRF) with calibrated thresholds
find_similar gate split into advisory (v1 default) and blocking (v1.x opt-in) tiers
Bootstrap inflection at M5-exit; build sessions are MCP clients of the substrate; local-stack scope; deploy deferred to network-access trigger
Extend get_context with scope_files parameter for pre-claim file-overlap awareness
Deploy strategy: Vercel + Supabase Cloud + rootDirectory=prototype + URL split inheritance
find_similar wider-eval (claude-agent-sdk corpus): blocking-tier framing reversed; advisory's universality demoted to corpus-dependent; cross-encoder reranker resolved as v1.x opt-in
Territory-model validation on the analyst case
Switchman as dependency vs. own-implementation for file locks
Upgrade path semantics for template versions
Plan-review checkpoint between claim and implementation
Composer role enum mixes work-discipline with access-level
Semantic contradiction check in the validator
Branch reaping in `reconcile.ts` for AI-speed contribution churn
Wider eval against external corpus (multi-corpus generalization)
Cross-encoder reranker as a v1.x option for the blocking tier
Deploy trigger conditions for the Atelier endpoint
Push-notification alerting via messaging adapter (out-of-band observability delivery)
